product.name: The Daily
product.full_title: HerBody No.01 — The Daily · Creatine + Collagen for Women
product.guarantee: 30-day flavour guarantee — hate it, we refund the pouch

formula_locked_v14.note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — per 14g scoop. Never invent or alter values. Headline: 2 lead actives + 11 supporting compounds = 13 actives. Shorthand: 5g + 5g + a complete multivitamin.

clinical_actives.name: Dandelion root extract
clinical_actives.role: fluid balance · de-bloat (traditional use framing ONLY)

clinical_actives.name: Cranberry PAC extract
clinical_actives.role: urinary tract · antioxidant (traditional use framing ONLY)

multivitamin_100_nrv.name: Vitamins A · E · K2 + full B-complex

certifications_text_claims_only: Halal certified · HMC protocol GB18/2026 (bovine collagen source-of-slaughter certified)
Made in a GMP-certified UK facility
Third-party batch tested · COA per lot

pledge.recipients: women's health and education charities — refuge, care and crisis support
pledge.mechanism: Every pouch earns 2 charity tokens in the companion app; the customer chooses the cause
pledge.framing_rule: Solidarity not saviour. Dignity not trauma. Never guilt.

app.name: HerBody companion app
pillars: Skin Score — daily selfie tracks skin/elasticity over weeks (reflects collagen 5g · HA 100mg · biotin 5000µg)
Charity tokens — 2 per pouch, customer allocates to her chosen cause

onboarding: First 7 days: half scoop (7g). Day 8+: full 14g scoop. The gentle way to start.
how_to: Shake with 200ml cold water for 10 seconds
Drink every morning — training days and rest days

the_math_gbp.note: What The Daily replaces if bought separately (UK retail, verify prices before publishing)

audience.primary: UK women 22–38, label-readers, training or wellness-active, values-driven
audience.positioning: Clinical AND kind — the studied dose, from one woman to another

verification_flags.reviews_note: NO customer reviews exist yet. DMCC Act 2024: publishing fake/unverifiable reviews is a banned practice. Reviews module stays DISABLED until verified reviews exist on a verifiable platform.
